title: rubus × rubristamineus
intro: Rubus × rubristamineus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × rubristamineus include its rich content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant offers several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cancer prevention. Rubus × rubristamineus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed for its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
